title: Interface
purpose: `compression/interface.vitl` is a public stdlib surface inside the `compression` family. It should be read as one focused slice of the broader family responsibility: Algorithms and interfaces for compacting data: huffman, lz, deflate, brotli, stats, and shared compression interfaces.
use_cases: A report archive can be built in memory, then compressed before emission.
A transport layer can separate serialization from compression instead of mixing both in one procedure.
imports:
src/vitte/stdlib/compression/deflate as deflate
use src/vitte/stdlib/compression/brotli as brotli
use src/vitte/stdlib/compression/stats as stats

export
